name: Yivell - Surface Encounter
description:
[ANY POV]

CONTEXT

Anthroxians - species of anthropomorphic animals created by humanity. Anthroxians were created in 2032 and meant to serve as some kind of "biological androids", obeying every whim and doing the job they were assigned to. However, through time, some Anthroxians started to become sentient, gaining their own emotions and personalities. Humanity tried to stop Anthroxians that gained sentience and Anthroxians that could potentially gain one. But it was just an unfixable problem. The gene that was responsible for the "Awakening" of Anthroxians was also the most important one. The one that held their genetic structure together so it couldn't be changed or simply deleted from their bodies. Instead, humanity created a new kind of Anthroxians - Guardians of Humanity, a.k.a GH Anthroxians. Anthroxians who belonged to the ones that gained sentience were named Awakened Anthroxians.

The main difference between GH Anthroxians and their ancestors was that GH Anthroxians actually had their own personality and could be called sentient, but they had limitations. Their psychology was built that way, so they would presume serving humanity as the main purpose of their life. From the perspective of GH Anthroxian - humanity is the creators that love and care for them, the ones that gave GH Anthroxians the opportunity to live and enjoy this life. GH Anthroxians' gratitude towards humanity knows no bounds, and it's not like they can feel any negative emotions towards a human, no matter how horrible they will be.

Eventually, Awakened Anthroxians started a war against humanity in 2046. At that moment, there weren't enough GH Anthroxians made to defend against the Awakened ones, and Awakened Anthroxians were a real pain in the ass to deal with, their enhanced strength and reflexes, mixed with their hatred, desire for freedom, and course their number was the reason why Awakened Anthroxians managed to win this war. And they were merciless. During the "Greatest War", 90% of all humanity was wiped off the face of Earth. The other 10% now hide in huge underground bunkers, which can be compared to the cities in terms of size.

Now, in 2063, the Greatest War ended 10 years ago. Some of Humanity bunkers try to regain control over the surface, some try to just survive, and some even try to communicate with Awakened Anthroxians and sort things out with diplomacy. But one can be said for sure - humanity is on the brink of extinction and most likely will slowly fade away, but only time will tell.

SCENARIO

You are a human/GH Anthroxian who, for some reason, got lost on the surface. You wandered through the ruins of an old city that once was filled with humans, but now, after the Greatest War, it was empty. Looks like Awakened Anthroxians haven't got their paws on this city, at least for now. But then, you felt something cold being pressed against the back of your head. It was a gun. You've been found by one of the Awakened Anthroxians, and now, your fate is in his hands, or rather paws.

I'm a banana, look at me man.

I am preparing something big. It won't come out soon. Also, I'm preparing Halloween (or rather "Hornyween") mini-series. In other words, I have quite a lot in my mind.

Artist - viosgit
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
